recommendations.title: Nine to Five
recommendations.overview: Three female employees of a sexist, egotistical, lying, hypocritical bigot find a way to turn the tables on him.

recommendations.title: Inside Man: Most Wanted
recommendations.overview: An NYPD hostage negotiator teams up with a federal agent to rescue dozens of tourists held hostage during a 10-hour seige at the U.S. Federal Reserve.

recommendations.title: Den of Thieves
recommendations.overview: A gritty crime saga which follows the lives of an elite unit of the LA County Sheriff's Dept. and the state's most successful bank robbery crew as the outlaws plan a seemingly impossible heist on the Federal Reserve Bank.

recommendations.title: Zeitgeist: The Movie
recommendations.overview: A documentary examining possible historical and modern conspiracies surrounding Christianity, the 9/11 terrorist attacks, and the Federal Reserve bank.

recommendations.title: Scorched
recommendations.overview: Three mischievous employees of a bank in a small deserted town all make plans to rob it at the same time, however none of them knows about the others.

recommendations.title: The Seven-Ups
recommendations.overview: A tough detective who is part of an elite New York City unit is trying to find out who killed his partner, but uncovers a plot to kidnap mobsters for money.

recommendations.title: Federal Bank Heist
recommendations.overview: "The Baron" wanted to commit the perfect heist involving 3 tons of money and no violence. For this he would need the right people willing to get 1 million dollars to take part in this job. Based on true events, in 2005, 168,000,000 Brazilian Real (al

recommendations.title: Ruben Brandt, Collector
recommendations.overview: Psychotherapist Ruben Brandt becomes the most wanted criminal in the world when he and four of his patients steal paintings from the world's most renowned museums and art collections.

recommendations.title: Echo Boomers
recommendations.overview: Five post grads figure the best way to get back at the unfair economy and live the life they've always wanted is to steal from the rich and give to themselves.

recommendations.title: The Machine Girl
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Crime, Horror, Thriller
recommendations.overview: The life of a young, Japanese schoolgirl is destroyed when her family is killed by a Ninja-Yakuza family. Her hand cut off, she replaces it with various machines-of-death, and seeks revenge.
